subject: Acme implementation next steps
body:
Hi Sarah,

Thanks again for the implementation discussion. Based on our notes, the next useful step is to align on a clear rollout timeline and confirm who from Acme will own the technical setup.

Here is the proposed path forward:

1. Confirm Acme's technical owner for API setup and onboarding coordination.
2. Share a concise implementation timeline with the main setup milestones.
3. Review the onboarding risk checklist together so we can remove blockers early.

I will also send a short API setup overview so your team has the right expectations before the next working session.

Best,
Demo User
rationale: The draft recaps the meeting, names the open ownership question, and keeps the requested timeline and onboarding risks visible.
